counters.description: really hard to deal with her invades, and can't burst easily due to her damage reduction on w. also, she can run away from charm with multiple q dashes, then go back in after it expires.
this matchup depends entirely on your pathing and is a macro skill check. try to path away from her early, and only deny marks if it is safe.
ban rengar in emerald+, but if the player is bad and doesn't get ahead this match-up becomes relatively easy. he will hold stacks to try and cleanse your w.
rek'sai is rarely picked but her kit counters your flanks. it's playable, but try to avoid her as she let's the enemy team know your rough position in stealth.
annoying at all stages of the game, and you have to ult away if he jumps on you.
your biggest enemy is yourself. dying and losing mejai's stacks is game-losing.

synergies.description: has cc and setup for ganks and picks. good pykes roam with you and help you stack mejai's.
can roam with you and help you get picks to stack mejai's.
look top when malphite hits 6 to stack dark seal. malphite is a good distractor to let you flank in teamfights.
eve synergizes well with strong splitpushers because she can either hover with them to pick their laner, or force engage on squishies while they send people to stop the splitpush.
you need to play for yourself to consistently win on this champion.
